author: design-phase-2a-accessibility-md-d5c6
content: Observation: AccessKit 0.24 has no NodeBuilder — it was renamed to Node. HasPopup enum has no True variant (only Menu, Listbox, Tree, Grid, Dialog). Used HasPopup::Menu as the generic has_popup mapping. Also: accesskit::Role uses CheckBox not Checkbox, ProgressIndicator not ProgressBar, Label not Text for text content roles.
